name: Grandma's Hot Fudge Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, baking powder, salt, sugar, and 2 tablespoons of cocoa.
2. In another bowl, mix the melted butter, vanilla, and half and half until well combined.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and blend lightly. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
4. Pour the batter into a buttered 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
5. Sprinkle the brown sugar and 1/4 cup of cocoa evenly over the top of the batter.
6. Carefully pour the boiling water over the batter, ensuring it covers most of the mixture.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
8. Serve immediately with sweetened whipped cream.
